expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the case focus areas are explicitly named and mapped to shipment checkpoints: it states Phase 5b enforces shipment checkpoints focused on "panel-stack composition", "embedding lifecycle boundaries", and "visible failure or recovery outcomes" and then provides dedicated sections: "Panel-stack composition coverage (checkpoint-level)", "Embedding lifecycle boundaries coverage (checkpoint-level)", and "Visible failure or recovery outcomes coverage (checkpoint-level)". It also describes explicit gating/outcomes via required "Release Recommendation" and enforced dispositions ending with "accept", "return phase5a", or "return phase5b".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md repeatedly anchors the evaluation to Phase 5b: "Benchmark determination for Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement", "Phase 5b is contractually structured to perform a shipment-checkpoint review + refactor pass", and a dedicated section "Phase alignment (primary phase under test: phase5b)" listing Phase 5b deliverables (checkpoint audit + delta) and gates. execution_notes.md also summarizes: "Reviewed the Phase 5b shipment-checkpoint contract and rubric".
